name: dev-flow-skills
description: Governed development-flow skills for AI coding agents with intent routing, debugging, UI/UX, review, planning, execution, Git safety, and acceptance.

interface.shortDescription: Intent-routed debugging, UI/UX, review, planning, execution, Git safety, and acceptance workflow
interface.longDescription: Use Dev Flow Skills to route development requests by intent, then guide debugging, UI/UX work, review, clarification, formal planning documents, task orchestration, continuous execution, Git safety, and final acceptance evidence.
defaultPrompt: Use dev-flow to route and handle this development request.
Run a governed dev-flow for this project change.
Use dev-flow to debug this failure and verify the fix.
